title: Patient Discharge Summary — MED-2026-4421
text:
SPRINGFIELD GENERAL HOSPITAL
PATIENT DISCHARGE SUMMARY

Patient Name: Maria Gonzalez
Date of Birth: July 22, 1979
Admission Date: June 15, 2026
Discharge Date: June 18, 2026
Medical Record No: MED-2026-4421
Attending Physician: Dr. Kevin Okafor

Emergency Contact: Carlos Gonzalez (husband)
Contact Number: (714) 883-2291

DIAGNOSIS:
1. Acute appendicitis with perforation
2. Post-operative infection, mild

SUMMARY OF CLINICAL COURSE:
Patient was admitted via the Emergency Department presenting with acute right lower quadrant pain. CT imaging confirmed acute appendicitis. Dr. Kevin Okafor performed a laparoscopic appendectomy on June 15, 2026. Recovery was complicated by mild surgical site infection treated with IV antibiotics.

DISCHARGE MEDICATIONS:
1. Amoxicillin-clavulanate 875mg PO BID x 7 days
2. Ibuprofen 400mg PO TID PRN pain

FOLLOW-UP:
Follow up with Dr. Kevin Okafor at Springfield General Outpatient Clinic within 7 days. Call (714) 883-2291 if symptoms worsen. Insurance policy: BlueCross PPO-8812-MG.
